sentences.arabic: تَزُورُ هَاجِرُ طَبِيبَهَا مَرَّةً كُلَّ سِتَّةِ أَشْهُرٍ.
sentences.translation: Hadžira posjećuje svog ljekara jedanput svakih šest mjeseci.
sentences.translationEn: Hajar visits her doctor once every six months.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الْفَحْصَ الدَّوْرِيَّ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Smatra da je redovni pregled veoma važan.
sentences.translationEn: She believes that regular check-ups are very important.

sentences.arabic: يَفْحَصُ الطَّبِيبُ ضَغْطَ الدَّمِ وَيَسْأَلُ عَنْ صِحَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ljekar mjeri krvni pritisak i pita o njezinom zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor checks her blood pressure and asks about her health.

sentences.arabic: تَشْعُرُ هَاجِرُ بِالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ بَعْدَ كُلِّ زِيَارَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Hadžira se osjeća smireno nakon svakog posjeta.
sentences.translationEn: Hajar feels reassured after every visit.
